title: cross-type `?` via a From-widening impl
statement: From docs/specpack/idioms.md #1. Define `enum Res[T, E] { ok Ok(T), Err(E) }`, `enum IoErr { Eof }`, `enum AppErr { FromIo(IoErr), Denied }`, `interface From[E] { fn from(e: E) -> Self; }`, an `impl From[IoErr] for AppErr` widening `IoErr` to `AppErr::FromIo`, `fn read_byte(ok: bool) -> Res[i64, IoErr]` (Ok(42) when `ok`, else Err(Eof)), and `fn read_wide(ok: bool) -> Res[i64, AppErr]` that calls `read_byte(ok)?` (cross-type `?` uses the From impl) and returns Ok of the byte. Define only these items.
